title: Login Issues - Can't Access
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account even after multiple password reset attempts.

title: Payment Failed - Card Declined
description: Customer attempted payment using Visa card but the transaction failed due to insufficient balance.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download January invoice from the billing section.

title: Incorrect Billing Address
description: Customer updated billing address but system still shows old city name.

title: App Crash on Launch
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after opening on Android 13 devices.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund two weeks ago but has not received the amount yet.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: Customer is not receiving 2FA verification codes on their registered phone number.

title: Unable to Update Profile Picture
description: Customer receives an upload failed error when trying to change profile picture.

title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
description: Customer wants to enable auto-renewal but the toggle option is disabled.

title: Missing Order Confirmation Email
description: Customer completed payment successfully but did not receive confirmation email.

title: Slow Internet Speed
description: Customer reports significantly slower internet speed compared to subscribed package.

title: Router Configuration
description: Customer needs assistance configuring a new Wi-Fi router.

title: Account Suspended Without
description: Customer claims their account was suspended without prior notification.

title: Change of Registered Phone
description: Customer wants to update their registered phone number but faces validation error.

title: Corporate Invoice Required
description: Customer requests a VAT-supported invoice for corporate accounting purposes.
